requirement: Work permit system for hot work, confined space entry and simultaneous operations in coke oven and gas handling areas.
evidence_inspection_type: Gas leakage survey and permit audit

requirement: Safety of control room and portable/fixed gas detection systems: calibration every 90 days with certified span gas.
Indian Boiler Regulations: annual statutory inspection and hydraulic test of boilers by competent authority.
Factories Act 1948 Section 28: hoists and lifts to be thoroughly examined every 6 months.
Factories Act 1948 Section 29: lifting machines — annual thorough examination and load test by competent person.
Factories Act 1948 Section 21: secure fencing of machinery — every dangerous part of machinery must be securely fenced; interlocked guards must not be defeated.
SMPV (Unfired) Rules: periodic testing of pressure vessels storing compressed/liquefiable gas — annual external, 5-yearly hydro.
CEA (Measures relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations: periodic condition monitoring of power transformers including DGA every 6 months for critical units.
Predictive maintenance of rotating equipment: vibration monitoring of critical compressors and pumps at 90-day intervals.
applies_to_types: Screw Compressor|Centrifugal Pump|Multistage Pump|Induced Draft Fan
